title: Vending Machines x ML
description: For Yeo's Pte Ltd, this project aimed to optimise their vending machine operations. Uses an internal dataset to create a PowerBI dashboard with ArcGIS capabilities, clustering algorithms to optimise truck routes and a scheduling optimiser.

title: React Game Site
description: For SKH Pte Ltd, this website was used in a staff giving campaign. Worked closely with the donation team to design a quick, simple game that would spur staff-giving to those in need. Successfully deployed on internal network.

title: RAG LLM App
description: This simple project aimed to create a private, fully local RAG agent that can read PDFs and allow users to ask questions about their own PDFs in natural language using the open-source Ollama platform.

title: Bacteria Simulation
description: This simulation (made with PyGame and Matplotlib) aimed to identify invasive species based on its genetic traits. The challenge is to code the simulation using Agent Based Modeling. Selected for the yearly SUTD ESD industry showcase.

title: Maze Solver
description: This genetic algorithm demo demonstrates how genetic algorithms can solve mazes. Designed to teach a younger audience as an introduction to machine learning methods.

title: Data Analysis on Hunger
description: Collected and analysed various datasets regarding hunger statistics in African countries. Using both ML and Humanities concepts, the analysis tackles both economical and cultural trends.

title: Sushi Restaurant Game
description: This game aims to help restaurant managers manage customer queues. Intended to replicate real queueing behaviour. Clean UI design and consistent code structure.
